Re
Fern Polrrrcer- PRACrrcEs CouurssroN
.128 J Street r Suite 620 r Sacramento. CA 95}14-2329
(916) 322-5660 e Fax (916) 322-0886
February 23,2010
Judge Runston G. Maino
P.O. Box 122724
San Diego, CA 92112-2724
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-043
Dear Judge Maino:
This letter confirms the receipt of your February 18, 2010, request for advice regarding
the responsibilities of the Administrative Office of the Courts (AOC). While the Commission
may provide informal assistance to persons who have duties under the Act (see Regulation
18329(c)(1)), you have not indicated you are seeking advice on behalf of AOC. Under the
provisions of Regulation 18329, unless you are an authorized representative of the person for
whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your
questions or provide analysis. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B) and (c)(1).) Therefore, your request
is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of Regulati on 18329 for your review.
Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Counsel
' By:
W. Wallace
General Counsel
JWW:jgl
Enclosure
